int8_note: INT8 ONNX (static PTQ, ONNX Runtime) is the edge-optimized classifier. Canonical copy: edge_deploy/models/classifier_int8.onnx. Mirror for packaging: artifacts/onnx_int8/classifier_int8.onnx (same bytes; no re-quantization).
